title: Ad Astra: Yappadium
description: A Ad Astra based Modpack with alot of Performance upgrades!
body:
A Create based Modpack with alot of Performance upgrades!
If you have seen Yappadium itself you know it is a good performance modpack, i used Yappadium for the base of this modpack

Mods included:
- Ad Astra (And addons!)

Important message:
Do not Update Nvidium (Neoforge), this will crash you're game.

Only updating this modpack when Create is updated to newer versions of Minecraft OR Create itself!
